use_cases: Displaying real-time conversations between two users in a chat interface
Creating simulated chat experiences for product demos and presentations
Implementing AI assistant or bot conversation UIs
Showcasing chat functionality in SaaS applications
ai_summary: A configurable chat interface component that displays animated conversations between two participants with support for text messages, images, and link bubbles. Features configurable styling for both chat bubbles, typing indicators, and link badges with smooth entry animations using motion/react.
